name: seo-dungeon
description: SEO Dungeon skill suite for Codex. 24 sub-skills (21 core + 1 orchestrator + 1 framework integration + 1 extension mirror) and 23 sub-agents backed by the v2 SEO engine and a gamified dungeon crawler UI.

interface.longDescription: SEO Dungeon is a gamified SEO analysis suite with Codex-compatible skills, Codex agent profiles, shared cache artifacts, optional SEO data integrations, and a dungeon crawler UI.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website for SEO issues.
